feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Document and Reporting Compliance
feed.subtitle: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: im trying to generate a repor t which shows the item code item name, qty consumer unit price & tota
entry.content: 1). [SAP AG][LIBODBCHDB DLL][HDBODBC] Syntax error or access violation;257 sql syntax error: incorrect syntax near "T0": line 1 col 1 'Backend scheduling job' (OBSJ) (at pos 1)

entry.title: Integration SAP DRC (cloud edition) with SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management
entry.content:
We just had a call with SAP regarding the integration of SAP Document and Reporting Compliance  with SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management .

During the call, SAP confirmed that it is not possible to connect SAP DRC to both SAP S/4 for outgoing invoices and SAP CIM for incoming invoices.

Desired Scenario: Our goal was to achieve a setup where SAP DRC could handle both outgoing and incoming invoices as described.

 

Why it doesn’t work: SAP DRC only allows one destination to be maintained per participant.So either you root the Invoice to the S/4 directly or to CIM. Once you root the invoice to CIM. You are no longer able to send an invoice from S/4 since the destination for the Participant is set to CIM. 

Users in S/4 need to have access to the CIM App for PDF Invoices and "Manage Electronic Documents"-App for E-Invoices.

Anyone else faced this limitation or found a solution?

 

Best regards

Sergen

entry.title: S4 Hana PUBLIC Cloud and DRC Cloud - Supplier e-invoicing legislation starting Jan 2025
entry.content:
Hello All! My organization has S4 Public CLoud and DRC Cloud installed in DEV system in preparation for Germany e-Invoicing for supplier invoices. There is a requirement to be ready to accept supplier e-invoices in Jan 2025.

However, we only have suppliers with PDF and XML attachments and none of them are connected to the PEPPOL network. I would like to understand how my organisation can test the PEPPOL to DRC connectivity with without the suppliers assistance?

I see the blog also (New B2B electronic invoicing law in Germany: What ... - SAP Community ) which talks about a new feature to allow us to manually upload into e-cockpit within DRC, but this is planned for sometime in December 2024.  SAP link provides more information   Regulatory Change Manager

I have reviewed this blog which talks about setting yourself up as sender and receiver but seems to be S4 Hana on prem and ECC.  End-to-end Testing using Peppol Exchange in SAP Do... - SAP Community

Not getting a huge amount of help from SAP either from support or from some DRC team members I am in contact with.

'email to DRC upload' functionality appears to be coming, but only planned for 13th december, doesnt give a lot of time to review before Jan 2025...  https://community.sap.com/t5/financial-management-blogs-by-sap/new-b2b-electronic-invoicing-law-in-germany-what-you-need-to-know/ba-p/13895483

Any help.ideas, great fully received

entry.title: SAP DRC - eDocument WS Provider ?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

One of my customers has ‘SAP DRC - On Premise’ on S/4HANA.
He works with an external partner to send electronic invoices (via a custom integration).
Now he also wants to be able to receive electronic invoices via this partner (Peppol Invoice Document/UBL).
My customer would like to see electronic invoices (Peppol) arrive in his eDocument cockpit, and then send them to VIM process.
His external partner takes care of the Peppol Access Point.
My customer doesn't want to use SAP DRC as a Peppol Access Point (via Cloud edition).

We therefore need to set up an interface between SAP and this external partner.
Does SAP DRC offer standard WS for this type of request?
Would SAP offer the outside partner a way to submit invoices directly to SAP DRC and, consequently, to the eDocument cockpit?

Although the SAP documentation on the topic is somewhat limited, I'm pretty sure that this strategy is possible.

Thank you in advance for your help.
YC

entry.title: Italy eInvoice submission to SDI
entry.content:
Consider the below scenario-

The invoice is created and sent to the SDI. If the SDI rejects the XML due to error such as: Wrong SDI code or wrong VAT number, is it possible to regenerate the XML without having to cancel the invoice? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: FY variant under DRC (bi-monthly reporting)
entry.content:
Hi all, Business scenario: Company is reporting on bi-monthly basis e.g. January 25, February 25 (two months) will be reported in April 2025, 

March 2025, April 2025 (two months) will be reported in June 2025

May 2025, June 2025 will be reported in August 2025

July 2025, August 2025 will be reported in October 2025 ...

Which option from FY variant has to be chosen pls. to meet the Customer needs. 

When I am reviewing SAP Help Portal this option is not stated here. 

Thanks a lot. Milos

entry.title: Send acknowledgements for AR e-invoice to CTRM (Third Party System)
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have business requirement of sending the acknowledgement of status from "Manage Electronic Documents" app to third party system. Once after submitting the AR invoices to the Romanian Tax authority, we need to send acknowledgement to external system from S/4 HANA public cloud, "Manage Electronic Documents" app and then once Romanian tax authority accept or reject e-document, again we need to send the acknowledgment to third party system in real time.

 

Is there any standard SAP event trigger during submission of invoices to tax authority and while acceptance or rejection of e-document by tax authority which we can send to third party system from S/4 HANA public cloud via BTP CPI along with the document number, company code and fiscal year?

Regards,

Babita

entry.title: Query on Modifying Standard Fields to XML Format for Romanian eInvoicing SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have a query regarding accommodating custom field values in the XML format for Romanian e-Invoicing. Currently, sales invoices from our external third-party system are posted as FI documents in SAP S/4HANA. We are utilizing several standard fields provided by SAP(e.g., Ref1, Ref2) to capture additional information, such as:

  • Third-party system invoice number
  • Item description
  • Unit price
  • Payment terms
  • Delivery date

 

Could you please guide on the following points?

  1. How can we map these fields to the XML format provided by SAP, aligning with the Romanian Tax Authority standards?
  2. What are the possibilities for incorporating custom field values into the XML file through customizing or enhancements?

Thanks & Regards,

Babita

entry.title: Sending eDocument Inbound Messages to Third Party non-SAP System for Supplier Invoice Romania
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am working on electronic supplier invoices, specifically pulling incoming messages (XML) using the message type RO_MESSAGE_PULL in the Processing Inbound Messages app once electronic documents are submitted to the Romanian Tax Authority by supplier and successfully processed.

As per the business requirement, after pulling these incoming messages (XML) related to eDocument process statuses from external systems, we do not want to process the messages in the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud system to create electronic documents. Instead, we need to send these XML messages directly to a third-party non-SAP system.

Could you please advise on following:

  1. Standard API Availability: Is there a standard API available to forward these incoming XML messages to a third-party system without processing them in SAP?
  2. Standard Event Availability: Is there a standard event or any mechanism that can be used to trigger the forwarding of these messages?

Regards,

Babita

entry.title: GST Reconciliation Report - India
entry.content:
Hello all,

We've a requirement that business wants to have a proper tax report which includes all the data related to GST as well as TDS apart from DRC Reporting (GSTR1, GSTR3B, GSTR6, FORM26Q, FORM27Q and FORM27EQ). 

Is there any application in SAP Public Cloud which will provide the data for all GST and TDS transactions? For other countries we've used "Tax Declaration Reconciliation" app but this will not work for India Localization

Please help me out as on this topic as soon as possible.

Thank you

entry.title: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance for Polish SAF-T Regulatory Requirements
entry.content:
We are thinking of implementing SAP and are therefore looking for a solution for our Polish subsidiary to cover the requirements of the Polish tax authorities for mandatory SAF-T reporting. As we plan to use SAP S/4HANA public cloud, the SAP Add-on for Polish SAF-T Regulatory Requirements cannot be used (as far as I understood).

In 2023 ‘SAP Document and Reporting Compliance’ was not yet able to cover the requirements of the Polish authorities. But what about today?

In this webinar (Standard Audit File-Tax (SAF-T) - Statutory Reporting in Poland (JPK) - SAP Product Strategy) here at the end of the last year there was an item on the agenda called "'Transition from SAP Add-on for Polish SAF-T Regulatory Requirements’ to ‘SAP Document and Reporting Compliance’".

entry.title: Edocument framework installiation 3005076 note deleted cl_edocument super class
entry.content:
Dear experts,

We are currently implementing Edocument framework for an S4hana 105 1 SP system.
Unfortunately TCI usage is not available in this system. We started implementing the notes manually.
We are at 3005076 note Document Compliance Framework (27) what deleted everything from cl_edocument definition.  That class is needed and we can't complete the implementation without this class.  (In other systems where we used TCI we did not face any issue with this class).

Do you have any advice or idea what step are missing?

 

we are following this list:

Reference: List of SAP Notes included in the TCI | SAP Help Portal

The prerequisites notes are implemented correctly.

entry.title: SAP DRC, Peppol / Error at PUSH operation HTTP response code: 500
entry.content:
Hi All,

does someone have an idea why we get HTTP response code: 500 for URL: http://XXX:44300/sap/bc/srt/rfc/sap/dcppushservice/100/dcppushservice/pushrequest

 

A webservice trace showed the following:

 

Send Document was successfull, but push Response to Source System fails.

 

 

Does anybody has a hint or idea where we can analyze further?

 

Thanks in advance,

Vasili

entry.title: Portugal EInvoice - Is it a mandatory requirement to generate electronic customer invoices?
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a requirement to send customer electronic invoices to a service provider (like Saphety) from S/4 Hana (private edition or on premises).

Is it necessary to install the document compliance and report framework, or there's an alternative flow in S/4? 

From what we've saw in sap note 2134248, it seems that the document compliance and report framework is necessary for "legal compliance aspects", not for all electronic invoices. This question is also because we're worried that this may cost an extra subscription for the customer.

thank you.

Best regards,

Nuno Fonseca

entry.title: Edocument Brasil - Simular fatura customizado
entry.content:
Olá pessoal!

Estamos em um projeto onde o cliente solicitou a customização do processo de entrada com escrituração do CT-e pelo edoc_cockpit, no DRC não é entregue solução conforme existe no GRC (CTEINBTM), criamos um processo Z com cópia do processo BRCTEFLEX.

Desenvolvemos a tela para executar o passo de Simular Fatura, pois o usuário necessita conferir o cálculo de imposto antes de postá-la. Para realizar a simulação estamos usando a BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_CREATE com o flag simulate no header, essa função não retorna o valor dos impostos na simulação, só retorna a mensagem de erro de diferenças de valor ou sucesso.
Nesse cliente não tem TM nesse processo, buscamos os dados de pedido em uma tabela Z.

Teriam alguma dica de como poderíamos fazer?

Agradeço pela colaboração.
Jossiane

entry.title: How add custom field on XML/PDF on a eDocument for Chile?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I need to add a custom field to the XML and PDF of an eDocument for Chile in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. However, I haven't found a specific BAdI for Chile that allows adding custom fields.

I noticed that there is a BAdI called EDOC_MX_FILL_CUSTOM_DATA, which is used for other countries like Mexico to modify the eDocument XML before generation and another BAdI to add this field to PDF also for Mexico.  App Extensibility: eDocument Cockpit 

Would this BAdI work for Chile as well? If not, is there a General BAdI or another recommended approach to add custom fields to the eDocument XML/PDF for Chile?

I appreciate any insights or guidance you can provide.
Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Saf-T reporting for Bulgaria
entry.content:
Good day,

 

I will soon be implementing a SAF-T report for Bulgaria and I was looking for advice. Anyone that has done this for other countries can give me some recommendations for Do’s and Dont’s? 

 

looking forward to your reply,

Nikola

entry.title: Comlemento de Pago de Factoraje con DRC?
entry.content:
Hola equipo, Actualmente con DRC eDocument obtengo los complementos de pago de los clientes, tengo un escenario de factoraje el cual incluye dos nodos de pago en la estructura del XML requerida por el SAT. Alguna idea de manejo de este escenario o de incluir el segundo pago mediante la ampliación edoc_adaptor?

Gracias de Antemano

Martín

entry.title: SNBCH - Zahlungsbilanz Schweiz - sehr lange Laufzeit
entry.content:
Hallo Experten 

vielleicht hätte jemand Erfahrung mit der Einrichtung der Schweizer Zahlungsbilanz. Wir haben im Customizing das Externe Meldewesen eingerichtet und bekommen auch eine Ausgabe wenn wir die Transaktion SNBCH aufrufen, aber es dauert ca. 2 Stunden bis der Report das Ergebnis ausgibt. 

Folgende Einstellungen haben wir im Customizing getätigt. 

1. Einrichten ihres externen Meldewesens 

2. Meldekategorie definieren -> Hier haben wir einen Eintrag für "CAS-G" definiert. 

3. Meldeunterkategorien definieren -> Hier haben mehrere Unterkategorien definiert (5.1, 9.1, 9.2, 9.3, 9.4 etc.) 

4. Kriterien für die Zuordnung von Belegen zu Meldekategorie/-unterkategorie definieren -> Hier haben wir zur Meldekategorie CAS-G mehrere HKONT Einträge zu den Meldeunterkategorien definiert, mit fortlaufender Laufnummer. HKONT Ranges und auch einzelne Konten. 

Wenn wir nun den Report mit SNBCH aufrufen und eine Selektion mitgeben auf Belegarten, Debitoren, Kreditoren oder deren Abstimmkonten, läuft der Report im Hintergrund ca. 2 Stunden und findet 65 Einträge. 

In unserem System sind sehr viele Daten, Millionen Einzelposten, könnte es sein, dass dieser Report so lange läuft, da es sich um einen R3 Report handelt und nicht auf S4 optimiert ist? Als BKPF/BSEG auswertet anstatt ACDOCA? 

Wir können uns sonst die lange Laufzeit nicht erklären. 

Vielleicht hätte ja jemand bereits ähnliche Erfahrung oder einen Tipp, wie die Laufzeit beschleunigt werden könnte. 

Besten Dank und viele Grüsse

Thomas

entry.title: Ireland IE_RTD_DCL DRC report as PDF???
entry.content:
Hi experts,

My customer says that this report should be generated as a PDF file. Is there this possibility to generate a PDF file within the DRC? Or does anyone of you know any other possibility?

Thanks in advance for any advice!

Rado
